query:
-- There are only 2 NBN services (S0883=24mo, S0884=36mo) but 4 NBN billing items including 2x 12-month items.
-- The two "Business Grade NBN 100/40 - 12 Months" items ($142.58 each) need a third NBN service.
-- Create a new service for the 12-month NBN (no AVC code available)

INSERT INTO services (
  externalId, customerExternalId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName,
  locationAddress, provider, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost, status,
  billingPlatform, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'S0883B', 'C0058', 'Internet', 'Business Grade NBN 100/40 - 12 Months',
  'Business Grade NBN 100/40 - 12 Months',
  '6 Telford Circuit, Yatala, Queensland, Australia, 4207',
  'Vocus', 0.00, 84.70, 'active',
  '["DataGate"]', NOW(), NOW()
);

-- Remove the incorrect 12-month assignments from S0883 and S0884
DELETE FROM service_billing_assignments
WHERE billingItemExternalId IN (
  'DG-11CF97791B9A4A7DBF77019C9D77',
  'DG-CC56E77CA4F94BC99E48019C9D77'
);

-- Create correct assignments: both 12-month items → S0883B
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments (
  billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId,
  assignedBy, assignmentMethod, notes, createdAt
) VALUES
('DG-11CF97791B9A4A7DBF77019C9D77', 'S0883B', 'C0058', 'system', 'auto', 'Reassigned from S0883 - 12mo item matched to new 12-month NBN service', NOW()),
('DG-CC56E77CA4F94BC99E48019C9D77', 'S0883B', 'C0058', 'system', 'auto', 'Reassigned from S0884 - 12mo item matched to new 12-month NBN service', NOW());

-- Update matchConfidence to high for the AVC-matched items (they have exact AVC codes)
UPDATE billing_items SET matchConfidence = 'high'
WHERE externalId IN (
  'DG-3D8AA0394CB5474BAFAD019C9D77',  -- 24mo AVC000101436766 → S0883
  'DG-F0CBA4D95817422084F1019C9D77'   -- 36mo AVC000106664528 → S0884
);

-- Update S0883B revenue to sum of its two 12-month billing items
UPDATE services SET monthlyRevenue = 285.16 WHERE externalId = 'S0883B';

-- Fix S0883 revenue: only the 24-month item ($135.69) + any overage items
-- First check what's still assigned to S0883
SELECT sba.serviceExternalId, SUM(bi.lineAmount) as totalRevenue
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
WHERE sba.serviceExternalId IN ('S0883', 'S0884', 'S0883B')
GROUP BY sba.serviceExternalId;
command:
